About

Security and systems focused CS student

I am a Computer Science student with experience in cybersecurity, Linux systems, research, and product execution. I enjoy working at the boundary between engineering and decision-making, where systems reliability and user trust intersect.

Focus Areas

  • Network security architecture and segmentation
  • Threat modeling and incident response design
  • Privacy engineering and data minimization
  • Internet governance and policy translation

Experience Highlights

  • Security lab assistant supporting campus network resilience
  • Policy research contributor for digital rights initiatives
  • Open-source collaborator on privacy tooling

Aryan

Computer Science student exploring security-aware systems, privacy, infrastructure, and trust at scale.
